cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out where each ball ends up after all these swaps. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, each has a specific colored ball. Let me start by listing out who has what at the beginning. Starting positions: - Alice: black ball - Bob: brown ball - Claire: blue ball - Dave: white ball - Eve: green ball Now, the game involves several swaps between pairs. Let me go through each swap step by step and track the changes. First swap: Dave and Eve swap balls. Dave has white, Eve has green. After swapping, Dave will have green and Eve will have white. Let me update the list. After first swap: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: green
